features: Hair Brushes and Combs Set: Our hair brush and comb set include every comb and brush necessary for crafting the perfect hairstyle, paddle brush, detangle hair brush, quiff round hair brush, wide tooth comb, rat tail comb, perfect for making various hair styles, such as slicked-back, pompadour, quiff and soon, meeting all of your needs of hairdressing.

Paddle Hair Brush: Paddle hair brush has flexible nylon round tipped bristles which feels tender to hair and scalp, ently responds to contours of the head, large surface area with evenly spaced bristles helps separate hair, rapid blow-styling, gentle styling, straightening, detangling wet & dry hair and smooth finish.

Nine Row Hair Brush: Fine lines hairbrush features robust bristles set in a removable airflow rubber cushion, excels in detangling and styling curly or fine hair. It also helps reduce oiliness, promoting healthier hair. Unique teeth glide effortlessly through wet or dry hair, minimising breakage and leaving your hair smooth and shiny.

Quiff Roller Brush: The compact round hair brush works well on increasing volume or adding quiff, suitable for shaping pompadour and pumping up pomps, make your look stand out. Ball tipped bristle to prevent scalp scratch and hair entanglement, through your hair effortlessly, allowing you to comb it with ease.

Wide Tooth Comb & Rat Tail Comb: These classic hair combs used to for haircut trimming, the wide and dense teeth make this suitable for use on thick hair and thin hair, can also create clear and distinct hair boundaries for styling needs, help to apply hair cream evenly.

Fit For All Hair Style: No matter what kind of hair style you are, there is always one for you. Works great on wet, dry, long, short, thick, curly, and detangler hair. Perfect hair comb set for men, women with all hair types. It is the perfect gift for parents, lover, brother, sisters, friend to express your love for them.
